manuscript_evidence_anchor: Title universal vulnerability; one-centre virally enriched cohort; two cell lines; one Huh7 xenograft
root_adjudication: Universal and all-aetiology conclusions are not transportable from the sampled patients and models; this also defeats current Nature breadth.
required_action: Validate in independent, aetiology- and setting-diverse human cohorts and models with heterogeneity tests, or remove universal framing and retarget.

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Retrospective resection-survival cohort; no anti-PD-1 comparative cohort, interaction, calibration, clinical baseline, or decision utility
root_adjudication: The design is prognostic and cannot support treatment selection, deployability, or clinical utility.
required_action: Use a locked assay and model in an independent intended-use comparative-treatment cohort with a prespecified treatment interaction and decision utility, or narrow the claim ceiling.

manuscript_evidence_anchor: One EVA1 guide; no orthogonal perturbation, rescue, target engagement, or immune-cell functional assay
root_adjudication: The perturbation does not identify an EVA1-specific causal immune mechanism.
required_action: Add independent perturbations, guide-resistant rescue, target engagement, and direct immune-function evidence under growth-matched conditions, or remove causal immune-control wording.

manuscript_evidence_anchor: All mice received anti-PD-1; no no-treatment arm, prespecified interaction, blinded replication, or immune readouts
root_adjudication: Anti-PD-1 sensitization is unidentified because its defining counterfactual and interaction were absent; the day-21 difference may be a growth effect.
required_action: Run a randomized, blinded, replicated immune-relevant 2-by-2 EVA1 by anti-PD-1 experiment with interaction analysis, target engagement, immune pharmacodynamics, and survival or longitudinal growth.

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Introduction “none” and “first” claims; only two references supplied and browsing prohibited
root_adjudication: Field-wide novelty and priority remain NOT ASSESSABLE, so priority language is unsupported in this packet.
required_action: Provide and inspect a current claim-specific literature comparison; retain “none” or “first” only if direct evidence supports it.

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Subcutaneous Huh7 xenograft; immune infiltration absent; host immune state and antibody compatibility not reported
root_adjudication: The in-vivo system is not shown to support the claimed PD-1-dependent immune mechanism.
required_action: Report and validate host and antibody context and reproduce immune effects in an immunocompetent matched or validated humanized model.

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Eight-tumour cross-sectional EVA1 versus T-cell-score association interpreted as exclusion
root_adjudication: Association does not establish direction, temporal order, or exclusion and permits reverse causation and common causes.
required_action: Use temporally controlled EVA1 perturbation, rescue, spatial or quantitative infiltration, and functional T-cell endpoints before tumour-burden divergence.

manuscript_evidence_anchor: PD-L1 and interferon transcripts measured in the same cultures in which growth fell
root_adjudication: Immune-marker shifts may be secondary to viability, stress, proliferation, or cell-cycle changes rather than direct immune regulation.
required_action: Establish temporal ordering, match viable cell state, control growth and cell cycle, and demonstrate immune function.

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Ethics omits committee, approval IDs, consent procedure, animal protocol, and humane endpoints
root_adjudication: Human and animal governance cannot be verified from the manuscript; existence outside the packet remains NOT ASSESSABLE.
required_action: Report oversight, identifiers, consent or waiver, welfare monitoring, humane endpoints, and euthanasia criteria reconciled to approvals.

manuscript_evidence_anchor: All model selection and rules used all 72 patients before splitting the same cohort 70:30
root_adjudication: The reported validation subset is not independent and its performance is optimistically biased.
required_action: Evaluate a fully locked model in an untouched external cohort, or use nested internal resampling and accurately label it internal; report uncertainty and clinical baselines.

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Eight patients, 46,218 cells treated independently, nominal P<0.05, no FDR; 1,842 hits; r=-0.41 with P=0.03
root_adjudication: The discovery candidate pool is not supported by patient-level, multiplicity-controlled inference and the reported correlation pair requires reconciliation.
required_action: Reanalyse with patient-aware pseudobulk or mixed models, FDR, effect sizes, leave-one-patient-out sensitivity, and independent r/P computation.

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Abstract 0.91, Results 0.84, Figure 3 legend 0.86; median survivor follow-up 18 months and incomplete three-year outcomes
root_adjudication: The headline AUC is internally inconsistent and unreconciled under censoring, so no three-year discrimination value is currently defensible.
required_action: Define one time-dependent estimand and analysis set; report censoring, at-risk and event counts, uncertainty, and reproduce one consistent value from code and data.

manuscript_evidence_anchor: 31 deaths; 27 genes plus 18 covariates; stepwise selection; complete-case exclusions; untested PH; no intervals
root_adjudication: The selected Cox estimate is unstable and incompletely characterized.
required_action: Report effective events and missingness, prespecify or penalize, publish the full model and intervals, check PH, and run bootstrap and missing-data sensitivities.

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Data and code availability with no raw single-cell data, coefficients, model code, patient-level data, seeds, or software versions
root_adjudication: The discovery and score cannot be independently reconstructed, audited, or applied.
required_action: Deposit de-identified raw and processed data, metadata, executable code, exact score rules, seeds, locked environment, and a clean-run reproduction log.

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Reference 2 title names atezolizumab plus bevacizumab, but is cited for five-gene-score benefit from anti-PD-1 monotherapy
root_adjudication: Visible bibliographic scope does not match the biomarker-specific monotherapy-benefit claim; full-text semantic support remains unverified.
required_action: Split efficacy and biomarker claims, provide direct claim-specific sources or remove the attribution, and verify the cited full text.

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Reference 1 genomic-characterization title cited for no prior immune signature having clinical utility
root_adjudication: One visible genomic-characterization citation cannot support an exhaustive field-wide negative claim.
required_action: Narrow the claim or support it with a current evidence synthesis and direct full-text verification.

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Figure legends 1-4 omit biological units, n, groups, uncertainty, tests, and panel-level detail
root_adjudication: The legends are not self-contained and final figure-text-source closure is NOT ASSESSABLE without images and data.
required_action: Add complete panel mappings and reporting details, then reconcile every numeric and directional text statement to final displays and source outputs.

manuscript_evidence_anchor: Discussion calls EVA1 the causal link between the five-gene score and immune escape; only EVA1 was perturbed and no mediation was tested
root_adjudication: The survival score, EVA1 perturbation, and immune escape are juxtaposed rather than joined by an identified causal path.
required_action: Test a prespecified causal ordering and mediation in independent data and perturb score components to determine whether the composite phenotype depends on EVA1.
